calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan B. Kadevari of the law offices of Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld (510-337-1001) appears as counsel for petitioner

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONERS, THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, e-mail: ssawyer@sftc.org. (L&M302)
